deconstruction.context: Phase 1 Gamification implementation is complete. Core logic updated in javascript.

lateral_prism.tech_view: Points now aggregate from 5 distinct lists. Real-time chart UI connected.
lateral_prism.biz_view: User now has a unified gamified incentive to complete even minor daily tasks like supplements and dog training.
lateral_prism.risk_view: All data is localized properly with Supabase sync configured but not blocking UI.
